headline: How Investors May Respond To Fortinet (FTNT) Losing Russell Defensive Status Amid AI Security Spotlight
summary: In late June, Fortinet, Inc. was removed from both the Russell 1000 Growth-Defensive Index and the Russell 1000 Defensive Index, even as it prepared to report second-quarter 2026 results on July 29. This index exclusion contrasts with growing investor attention around Fortinet’s role in AI-enabled cybersecurity and its expanding ecosystem of cloud marketplace and services partners. We’ll now examine how Fortinet’s index removal, against a backdrop of AI-focused enthusiasm, could influence...

headline: Cybersecurity Spending Just Crossed $300 Billion and These 3 ETFs Are the Cleanest Plays on the AI Era Attack Surface
summary: Global cybersecurity spending is forecast to exceed $300 billion in 2026, and the catalyst is no longer abstract. AI agents now outnumber human identities within enterprises by roughly 109 to 1; Fortinet’s threat report logged a 389% year-over-year jump in ransomware victims; and Check Point measured a 51-point gap between corporate AI adoption and security ... Cybersecurity Spending Just Crossed $300 Billion and These 3 ETFs Are the Cleanest Plays on the AI Era Attack Surface

headline: Cisco Stock Is Soaring On A Massive AI Bet
summary: Management put a stunningly large number on its AI future, and investors are piling in. But the real story is what this growth costs.
